title: Brazil Moves to Ban Prediction Markets on Elections, Sports

summary: Brazil moved to ban prediction markets tied to elections and sporting events, tightening rules on a booming practice that’s drawing scrutiny across the world.

title_cn: 美伊会谈希望推动股市创历史新高：市场结束
summary: Hopes that the US and Iran will be back to the negotiating table drove stocks toward all-time highs, with the market also rising after a blowout forecast from Intel Corp. and the closing of a probe into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.

summary: Six One Commodities LLC has more than tripled its physical US natural gas trading activity, catapulting the firm above heavyweight commodity houses Trafigura Trading, Freepoint Commodities and Hartree Partners.

title: Baker Hughes | Outlook Despite Middle East Disruption
title_cn: 贝克休斯|尽管中东局势动荡，但前景依然乐观
summary: Baker Hughes beats on earnings, sees outlook hold despite Mideast disruption. Lorenzo Simonelli, president and CEO of Baker Hughes, says the “outlook for the business fundamentals remains unchanged,” excluding the ongoing impacts in the Middle East. He spoke with Dani Burger and Matt Miller on Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Gain as DOJ Drops Fed Probe, Opening Path for Warsh

title: The Real Problem with Private Credit
title_cn: 私人信贷的真正问题
summary: Credit that turns out to behave a lot like equity.

title: Amazon-Backed X-Energy Climbs 31% After $1.02 Billion US IPO

summary: X-Energy Inc. shares opened 31% above their IPO price, after the nuclear energy firm raised $1.02 billion in an upsized US initial public offering.

title: Bessent Casts Potential New Swap Lines as Boost to Dollar’s Role
title_cn: Bessent 将潜在的新互换额度视为提振美元的作用
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent talked up the idea of extending currency swap lines to more countries as a way to strengthen “dollar dominance” in a social media post Friday as speculation continues over why rich countries such as the United Arab Emirates would be interested in the arrangement.

title: Oil Falls on Report US Delegation to Travel For Iran Talks
title_cn: 报道称美国代表团将前往伊朗进行会谈 油价下跌
summary: Oil fell to intraday lows amid fresh signs that elusive peace talk plans between the US and Iran may materialize after all, stoking hopes of a resumption to flows though the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: European Stocks Fall as Investors Await Word of Iran Peace Talks
title_cn: 投资者等待伊朗和谈消息，欧洲股市下跌
summary: European stocks fell as investors tracked developments around potential US-Iran peace talks amid a continued standoff in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: CVC’s Maticmind Tries to Calm Bondholders as Founder Probed
title_cn: CVC 的 Maticmind 创始人受到调查后试图安抚债券持有人
summary: Maticmind SpA said all its published financial information is “complete and correct” as it sought to reassure investors after a fraud probe into the software firm’s founder sent its bonds sliding.

title: Nasdaq 100 Heads for Record After Intel’s Blockbuster Guidance
title_cn: 英特尔发布重磅指引后，纳斯达克 100 指数创新高
summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index was on track for a fresh all-time closing high on Friday as a blockbuster sales forecast from Intel Corp. fueled a rally in technology stocks. Meanwhile, traders optimism about the Middle East increased as Iran’s foreign minister said he was headed to Pakistan.

title: Crypto Faithful Wins Memecoin Lunch with Trump for $500
title_cn: Crypto Faithful 以 500 美元赢得与特朗普的 Memecoin 午餐
summary: Last year, Morten Christensen spent about $1,200 to attend a dinner with President Donald Trump reserved for the top holders of the president’s memecoin. This year, he’s going to a similar event for just around $500.

title: Gold Gains on Iran Talks Optimism With Fed Outlook in Focus
title_cn: 伊朗黄金上涨引发乐观情绪，美联储前景成为焦点
summary: Gold advanced on optimism that the US and Iran are moving toward talks after days of deadlock, with traders also asessing the Federal Reserve’s interest rate path after the Justice Department dropped a probe of Chair Jerome Powell.

title: Euro Zone Price Spike Seen Surging Higher in Second Month of War
title_cn: 战争第二个月欧元区物价飙升
summary: Euro-zone inflation probably jumped in April to the highest in 2 1/2 years as fallout from the Iran war squeezed economies across the currency area.

title: Azerbaijan Sold Gold Worth $3 Billion in First Ever Drawdown
title_cn: 阿塞拜疆首次抛售价值 30 亿美元的黄金
summary: Azerbaijan’s State Oil Fund sold about 22 tons of gold in the first quarter of the year, after a record-breaking rally pushed the sovereign wealth fund’s allocation of the metal to its maximum threshold.

title: DOJ Drops Powell Probe, Smoothing Path for Warsh to Fed
title_cn: 美国司法部放弃鲍威尔调查，为沃什的美联储之路铺平道路
summary: The Justice Department is ending a controversial investigation into building-renovation cost overruns by the Federal Reserve, potentially clearing a path to confirmation for Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s pick to be the next Fed leader. Bloomberg's Michael McKee breaks the news on "Bloomberg Intelligence." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘The Jig Is Up’: 70% Crash Marks Quick End to Avis Short Squeeze
title_cn: “The Jig Is Up”：70% 的崩溃标志着安维斯空头挤压的快速结束
summary: The speculative mania around Avis Budget Group Inc. erupted quickly. It collapsed even faster.

title: Pakistan Expects to Host Another Round of US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 巴基斯坦预计将主办新一轮美伊会谈
summary: Pakistani officials expect to host another round of peace talks between Iran and the US. Iran's top diplomat is going there, but it's not clear if a US delegation is as well. Retired US Army Colonel Wayne Sanders, a Bloomberg Intelligence analyst, is on Bloomberg Open Interest.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pakistan Buys LNG Supply From Spot Market to Ease Energy Crunch
title_cn: 巴基斯坦从现货市场购买液化天然气供应以缓解能源紧缩
summary: Pakistan purchased a liquefied natural gas shipment from the expensive spot market for the first time in over two years to ease a shortage caused by the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 4/24/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 4 月 24 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fuel Shortages Reappear Across Bolivia, Rattling New US Ally
title_cn: 玻利维亚各地再次出现燃料短缺，令美国新盟友感到不安
summary: Bolivia is running out of fuel again, challenging a new government that had vowed to fix the economy after two decades of socialist rule.

title: Intel Plans Bond Sale for Repurchase of Plant Stake From Apollo
title_cn: 英特尔计划出售债券以从阿波罗回购工厂股权
summary: Intel Corp. is readying a potential bond sale to finance the repurchase of half of a plant in Ireland that it had previously sold to Apollo Global Management Inc..

title: Hut 8 Readies High-Grade Bond Sale for Google-Backed Data Center
title_cn: Hut 8 准备为 Google 支持的数据中心出售高级债券
summary: Hut 8 Corp. is considering tapping the investment-grade debt market to fund construction of a data center linked to Alphabet Inc.’s Google, adding to a wave of borrowing driven by the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Iran ‘Will Always Believe’ They Control Hormuz
title_cn: 伊朗“永远相信”他们控制霍尔木兹
summary:
"We all know they can close it again."

Iran now firmly believes it controls the Strait of Hormuz, former Deputy US Secretary of State Wendy Sherman says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, EU Reach Critical Minerals Deal to Weaken China’s Grip
title_cn: 美国与欧盟达成重要矿产协议以削弱中国的控制力
summary: The US and European Union on Friday reached an agreement to coordinate on securing critical minerals and bolstering supply chains, in a move meant to reduce reliance on China for rare earths and permanent magnets.

title: SNB Chief Economist Lenz to Retire, With Brown Set to Take Over
title_cn: 瑞士央行首席经济学家伦茨即将退休，布朗将接任
summary: Swiss National Bank Chief Economist Carlos Lenz is set to retire at the end of the year and will be succeeded by Martin Brown, the current director of the central bank’s academic research institution.

title: One by One, Europe’s Safest Government Bonds Fall From Grace
title_cn: 欧洲最安全的政府债券一一失宠
summary: The traditional hierarchy of debt in Europe is facing its latest shake-up as worsening public finances in Belgium threaten to turn some of the region’s once-safest bonds into a risky bet.

title: Data Centers Are Finding a Surprising Way to Deploy Batteries
title_cn: 数据中心正在寻找一种令人惊讶的电池部署方式
summary: By pairing energy storage with natural gas, hyperscalers are able to get power faster and do so behind the meter.

title: Intel Shares Eclipse Dot-Com Peak After Blockbuster Forecast
title_cn: 英特尔分享了在重磅炸弹预测后Eclipse Dot-Com峰值
summary: Intel Corp. shares hit a record high after the chipmaker delivered a sales forecast that shattered Wall Street expectations, showing that it’s finally benefiting from a boom in AI spending.

title: SpaceX, Anduril Among Companies to Win Golden Dome Contracts
title_cn: SpaceX、Anduril 等公司将赢得金顶合同
summary: The US Space Force awarded 12 companies, including Lockheed Martin Corp. and SpaceX, contracts worth up to $3.2 billion to develop prototypes for space-based interceptors under President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome plan.

title: DOJ Joins Musk’s xAI Suit Against Colorado AI Discrimination Law
title_cn: 美国司法部加入马斯克针对科罗拉多州人工智能歧视法的 xAI 诉讼
summary: The Trump administration is joining Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company xAI in its legal challenge to Colorado’s new state law that seeks to prevent discrimination by autonomous tools in employment and other areas.

title: The Hottest Phone for Kids Right Now Is a $100 Landline
title_cn: 目前最热门的儿童手机是 100 美元的固定电话
summary: The Tin Can has gone viral over the past year, mostly through word of mouth. Now schools want to get even more of them in students' homes.

title: Kushner’s Thrive Bets on San Francisco Giants With New Company
title_cn: 库什纳通过新公司押注旧金山巨人队
summary: Thrive, the brand behind Joshua Kushner’s venture megafirm Thrive Capital, has launched a new company to invest in iconic names — with its first bet targeting a Major League Baseball team.

title: Google Plans to Invest up to $40 Billion in Anthropic
title_cn: 谷歌计划向 Anthropic 投资 400 亿美元
summary: Google will invest $10 billion now in Anthropic PBC at a $350 billion valuation. Google could invest another $30 billion later. Bloomberg's Shirin Ghaffary explains this deal with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s DeepSeek Unveils New Model a Year After Shock Launch
title_cn: 中国 DeepSeek 在震撼推出一年后推出新型号
summary: China's DeepSeek is back with a brand new flagship AI model, a year after its open source model upended Silicon Valley. Tom Mackenzie explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Looksmaxxing’ Star Clavicular Kicked Off YouTube Again
title_cn: “Looksmaxxing”明星锁骨再次从 YouTube 上架
summary: Controversial social-media figure Clavicular, known for his extreme approach to achieving male beauty standards, had his videos removed again from YouTube on Wednesday night.

title: US Government Stake in Intel Has Jumped 300% to $36 Billion
title_cn: 美国政府在英特尔的股份猛增 300% 至 360 亿美元
summary: The value of the US government stake in Intel Corp. has increased fourfold to hit a value of about $36 billion after the chipmaker’s financial outlook showed a resurgence in sales.

title: Finma Says Immediate Mythos Access Would Pose Systemic Bank Risk
title_cn: Finma 称直接神话访问将带来系统性银行风险
summary: Switzerland’s top financial regulator said giving banks quick and easy access to Anthropic PBC’s artificial intelligence tool Mythos would create a severe risk for the country’s financial system.

title: DeepSeek Unveils Flagship AI Model a Year After Breakthrough
title_cn: DeepSeek 在突破一年后推出旗舰人工智能模型
summary: A year after rattling Silicon Valley with its technology, China’s DeepSeek rolled out preview versions of a new flagship artificial intelligence model, calling it the most powerful open-source platform in a challenge to rivals from OpenAI to Anthropic PBC.

title: McKinsey Partner’s Drone Firm Stake Spurs Conflict Concerns
title_cn: 麦肯锡合作伙伴的无人机公司股权引发冲突担忧
summary: A top McKinsey & Co. consultant who advises on defense projects around the world has for years owned a personal stake in German military tech startup Helsing.

title: Texas Ranch Lures Futuristic Startups to Revive US Manufacturing
title_cn: 德克萨斯州牧场吸引未来初创公司重振美国制造业
summary: The charismatic founders preach a gospel of reviving American manufacturing through frontier grit.

title: The Breakup That Wasn’t: Live Nation Keeps Ticketmaster
title_cn: 并非分手：Live Nation 保留 Ticketmaster
summary:
Live Nation and Ticketmaster’s anti-monopoly trial has surfaced some shocking emails, where employees called customers "stupid" and bragged about "robbing them blind" with fees and extra charges on things like parking and lawn chair rentals.

Bloomberg's Ashley Carman joins Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith to discuss Live Nation's settlement with the DOJ and what it means for the cost of concert tickets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Norway Set to Become Latest Country to Ban Social Media for Under 16s
title_cn: 挪威将成为最新一个禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体的国家
summary: Norway plans to restrict access to social media for children under 16, joining a growing number of countries responding to concerns about the potential harm kids face online.

title: Meta Inks Deal to Use Amazon’s Graviton Processors for AI
title_cn: Meta Inks 达成协议，将使用亚马逊的 Graviton 处理器进行人工智能
summary: Amazon.com Inc. and Meta Platforms Inc. have struck a multibillion-dollar deal for the social-media giant to rent hundreds of thousands of Amazon’s general-purpose chips for its AI efforts.

title: Trump's Social Message Blitz Hurts Iran Talks Say Officials
title_cn: 官员称特朗普的社交信息闪电战损害了伊朗谈判
summary: The prospect of Iran agreeing to more in-person peace talks with the US is being hindered by President Donald Trump's threats and brash social media posts, according to several officials with knowledge of the diplomatic efforts to end their war. Trump's Truth Social posts — as well as his decision to continue with a naval blockade of Iranian ports — have been detrimental to ongoing negotiations through mediators such as Pakistan, according to two US officials familiar with the matter. Our EMEA News Director Will Kennedy joins Stephen Carroll and Caroline Hepker to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP CFO: We Want to Lead Market Rather Than Follow
title_cn: SAP CFO：我们希望引领市场而不是跟随
summary: SAP reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter revenue growth in its cloud division, beating analyst estimates. The results come as Europe's largest software company ramps up the integration of artificial intelligence agents across its platform. SAP CFO Dominik Asam joined Bloomberg's Opening Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SLB to Acquire S&P Global’s Subsurface Oil Software Business
title_cn: SLB 将收购 S&P Global 的地下石油软件业务
summary: SLB, the world’s largest oilfield service provider, agreed to acquire S&P Global Energy Inc.’s geoscience and petroleum-engineering software business.

title: Europe’s Attempt to Protect Children Online Crashes into Its Privacy Laws
title_cn: 欧洲保护儿童上网的尝试遭遇隐私法的打击
summary: The region tries to balance the rights of users online with keeping children safe

title: Investors Bet on Trade Schools as AI Clouds White-Collar Job Market
title_cn: 人工智能云服务白领就业市场，投资者押注贸易学校
summary: Growing concerns about a white-collar job apocalypse are helping to turn once-sleepy trade school stocks into investor darlings.

title: Citadel's Esposito Sees Costs of AI Alongside Trading Benefits
title_cn: Citadel 的 Esposito 看到了人工智能的成本和交易优势
summary: Citadel Securities is seeing strong returns from ramping up investment in AI as the soaring cost of GPUs and infrastructure is raising barriers for new competitors. Jim Esposito, President of Citadel Securities speaks in a wide-ranging interview at the Bloomberg Markets and Banking Summit in New York on April 22nd, 2026 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lidl Billionaire Backs Cohere’s Plan to Buy German AI Champion
title_cn: Lidl 亿万富翁支持 Cohere 收购德国人工智能冠军的计划
summary: Artificial intelligence developer Cohere Inc. has agreed to buy Aleph Alpha, a startup once considered Germany’s national AI champion, in a deal that includes a $600 million investment from German retailer Schwarz Group.

title: Revolut Winds Down Commodities Service in Some European Markets
title_cn: Revolut 终止部分欧洲市场的商品服务
summary: Revolut Ltd. is shuttering its commodities business for trading precious metals in parts of Europe.

title: MS NOW Looks to Be a More Social Network With New App
title_cn: MS NOW 借助新应用打造更具社交性的网络
summary: MS NOW, the media network formerly called MSNBC, is using Saturday’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner as an opportunity to debut its new rebrand in Washington.The network is hosting a brunch for student journalists and on-air talent on Friday. Then, following the Saturday dinner, MS NOW has invited Washington insiders to what’s being billed as a “subversive” underground after party at a former trolley car station nearby.

title: White House Sends Team to Pakistan as Iran Balks at Talks
title_cn: 伊朗在谈判中犹豫不决，白宫派遣团队前往巴基斯坦
summary: President Donald Trump will send envoys to Pakistan with the intention of meeting with Iranian officials, while Tehran sounded a pessimistic tone on the prospects for talks to end the eight-week war roiling the global economy.

title: US Soldier Charged With Using Classified Data to Bet on Capture of Maduro
title_cn: 美国士兵被控利用机密数据押注抓获马杜罗
summary: A US Army soldier, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, was charged with using classified information to bet on if then-Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro would be removed from office. Prosecutors say Van Dyke used Polymarket's prediction market and made more than $400,000. Van Dyke was part of the US team that eventually arrested Maduro in Venezuela. Matt Miller and Dani Burger discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Air Force, Navy Plan to Boost F-35 Fleet After Record Budget
title_cn: 美国空军和海军计划在预算创纪录后增强 F-35 机队
summary: The Air Force and Navy proposed stepping up purchases of of Lockheed Martin Corp’s F-35 fighter jet over the next five years, a show of confidence for a plane that Elon Musk and other critics argue is becoming obsolete.

title: DOJ Drops Powell Probe, Smoothing Path for Warsh to Lead Fed
title_cn: 美国司法部放弃鲍威尔调查，为沃什领导美联储铺平道路
summary: The Justice Department is ending a controversial investigation into building-renovation cost overruns at the Federal Reserve, potentially clearing a path to confirmation for Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s pick to be the next chair of the central bank.

title: Soldier Charged With Using Classified Data to Bet on Maduro
title_cn: 士兵被控使用机密数据押注马杜罗
summary: A US Army soldier was charged with using classified information about the timing of the capture of then-Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro to make more than $400,000 trading on Polymarket’s prediction market, the Justice Department said Thursday.

title: Hegseth Accuses Europe, Asia of ‘Freeriding’ Over Hormuz
title_cn: 赫格斯指责欧洲和亚洲在霍尔木兹海峡上“搭便车”
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth accused European and Asian countries of relying on the US military to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz after it was closed by the war against Iran. "The time for freeriding is over,” he said Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lula Has Skin Cancer Lesion Removed Ahead of Reelection Bid
title_cn: 卢拉在竞选连任之前切除了皮肤癌病变
summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva underwent surgery to remove a fairly routine skin cancer lesion, a procedure doctors said would have no impact on the 80-year-old leader’s reelection campaign.

title: Citadel Sends Warning Shot to NYC After Mamdani Blasts Billionaire Griffin
title_cn: 马姆达尼爆炸亿万富翁格里芬后，Citadel 向纽约市发出警告
summary: Just two months ago, Vornado Realty Trust was boasting about financial behemoth Citadel’s appetite for New York real estate, vowing to create a new icon for the Manhattan skyline.

title: DOJ Dropping Powell Probe Is Step in Right Direction, French Hill Says
title_cn: 弗伦奇希尔表示，美国司法部放弃鲍威尔调查是朝着正确方向迈出的一步
summary: US Representative French Hill, chair of the House Financial Services Committee, discusses the recent decision by the Department of Justice to drop the criminal investigation into the Federal Reserve's building costs. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, Rep. Hill says the criminal probe was a distraction that could have delayed the appointment of a new Federal Reserve chair. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He'll 'Look Into' Prediction Market Bets
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将“研究”预测市场赌注
summary: President Donald Trump said he would investigate federal employees placing bets on event-betting platforms during comments with reports at the White House on April 23. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mark Carney's C-Suite Inner Circle Is Selling the World on Canada
title_cn: 马克·卡尼的高管核心圈子正在向世界推销加拿大
summary: Facing economic strains and tensions with the US, the prime minister is relying on a tight-knit group of allies to make trade deals and streamline government.

title: UK’s Assisted Dying Bill Fails After Parliamentary Time Runs Out
title_cn: 英国协助死亡法案在议会时间耗尽后失败
summary: A bill to legalize assisted dying in England and Wales fell by the wayside on Friday when the bill ran out of time after becoming snarled in the upper chamber of Britain’s parliament.

title: Limiting Oil Exports Would Be a Mistake, McNally Says
title_cn: 麦克纳利表示，限制石油出口将是一个错误
summary: President Donald Trump is making it easier to move oil, fuel and fertilizer around the US by extending a 90-day shipping waiver. Robert McNally, Rapidan Energy Group founder, says the move could help "on the margins." He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian President on Europe-US Relations, Iran War Impact
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统谈欧美关系、伊朗战争影响
summary: Romanian President Nicușor Dan tells Bloomberg’s Oliver Crook that Bucharest backs the NATO transatlantic alliance, as he highlights US-Romanian economic ties with the country aiming to boost domestic natural gas production. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romania President Defends Europe’s ‘Pragmatic’ Hormuz Stance
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统捍卫欧洲“务实”霍尔木兹立场
summary: Romania’s President Nicusor Dan said the “pragmatic” approach taken by a European coalition boosts the chances of Iran reopening the strait of Hormuz, as the Middle East crisis pushes energy prices up across the continent.

title: Trump Says He Won't Be Rushed to End Iran War
title_cn: 特朗普表示他不会急于结束伊朗战争
summary: President Donald Trump said he won't be rushed to end the war in Iran and pushed back on questions that the conflict is exceeding the four-to-six week timeline that he and advisers previously set for the war. He spoke Thursday in the Oval Office.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Companies Had 815 Classified Data Violations, GAO Finds
title_cn: GAO 发现美国公司存在 815 起机密数据违规事件
summary: The Pentagon agency tasked with protecting classified information released to US federal contractors found more than 800 security violations and more than 1,000 open security vulnerabilities last fiscal year, according to the Government Accountability Office.

title: EU Is Drafting Plans to Defend Its Borders as US Support Wavers
title_cn: 随着美国支持动摇，欧盟正在起草保卫边界的计划
summary: The European Union is drawing up plans to help countries fight off a military assault with or without its superpower ally, the US.

title: Russia and Ukraine Exchange 193 Prisoners Each in Latest Swap
title_cn: 俄罗斯和乌克兰最新交换囚犯各 193 名
summary: Russia and Ukraine exchanged prisoners of war on Friday, swapping 193 from each side, the two countries said.

title: Trump Says Putin G-20 Visit Would ‘Probably Be Very Helpful’
title_cn: 特朗普称普京二十国集团访问“可能非常有帮助”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he didn’t expect Vladimir Putin to attend the Group of 20 meeting at his resort in Doral, Florida, later this year, but said the Russian leader’s participation could be useful.

title: Hegseth Accuses Europe, Asia of ‘Freeriding’ Over Hormuz
title_cn: 赫格斯指责欧洲和亚洲在霍尔木兹海峡上“搭便车”
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth accused European and Asian countries of relying on the US military to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz after it was closed by the war against Iran.

title: Hegseth Tells Europe the Time for Freeriding Is Over
title_cn: 赫格斯告诉欧洲搭便车的时代已经结束
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth criticized European and Asian countries for relying on the US military to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. He said at a Pentagon briefing Friday morning that the Navy blockade is growing and going global. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary’s Magyar Taps Blind Minister in Diverse Cabinet Drive
title_cn: 匈牙利马扎尔在多元化内阁活动中任命盲人部长
summary: Hungary’s incoming Prime Minister Peter Magyar is planning to replace Viktor Orban’s all-male cabinet with a more diverse team of top officials as he looks to make a clean break with his country’s illiberal past.

title: Meloni Hasn’t Spoken to Trump, But Says US Ties Are ‘Solid’
title_cn: 梅洛尼尚未与特朗普交谈，但表示美国关系“牢固”
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni said she’s had no recent contact with President Donald Trump, though relations with the US were “still solid.”

title: India Mulls Options on Iran Port Stake Before Sanctions Kick In
title_cn: 印度在制裁生效前考虑伊朗港口股权的选择
summary: India is considering various options regarding its stake in the Chabahar port in Iran, including temporarily divesting from it, ahead of the expiry of a US sanctions waiver in coming days, officials familiar with the matter said.
